items.headline: Senate again votes against ending Iran war, but tougher votes are coming
items.summary: It marked the beginning of a new phase in Democrats' pressure campaign in Congress to pull U.S. forces from the Middle East war.

items.headline: Pakistani Delegation Arrives In Tehran In Move To Ease Tensions And Arrange More U.S.-Iran Talks
items.summary: Meanwhile, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent warned that the U.S. will ramp up its infliction of economic pain on Iran.

items.headline: Can Trump get a better Iran deal than Obama?
items.summary: The 2015 Iran deal curbed Tehran's nuclear program until the US pulled out. After years of failed diplomacy and 40 days of war, talks are back on. Donald Trump has said he can strike a "better" deal than Barack Obama.

items.headline: S&P 500 hits new all-time high as investors shrug off Iran war oil price spike
items.summary: The S&P 500 hit a new all-time high Wednesday, a remarkable turnaround for stocks while the war with Iran drives up energy prices and cuts into global growth.

items.headline: U.S. and Iran could meet in Pakistan for peace talks next week: MS NOW
items.summary: Oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at a trickle as the U.S. enforces a retaliatory blockade of Iranian ports.

items.headline: Chinese oil tanker’s retreat from the Strait of Hormuz shows how Trump’s blockade is working
items.summary: The sanctioned Chinese oil tanker that appeared to have crossed the Strait of Hormuz after the US blockade was implemented had been stopped and forced to dock in Iran, new tracking data shows.

items.headline: Hormuz shipping muted as US blockade takes hold: Tracking data

items.headline: GOP holds with Trump on Iran war, but cracks emerge as deadline nears
items.summary: Senate Republicans block a fourth war powers resolution on Trump's Iran war, but questions grow as the 60-day congressional deadline approaches.

items.headline: North Korea showing 'serious ability' over nuclear weapon
items.summary: North Korea is showing a "very serious increase" in its ability to produce nuclear weapons, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency has said.

items.headline: Iran war diverts U.S. military and attention from Asia ahead of Trump's summit with China's leader

items.headline: In 2011, Barack Obama said it was time to ‘pivot’ to Asia. But 15 years later, the U.S. is still at war in the Middle East
items.summary: “Rebalancing to Asia is highly relevant to America’s national interests, but it has been undercut by many bad decisions.”

items.headline: Iran war diverts US military and attention from Asia ahead of Trump's summit with China's leader

items.headline: Iran war diverts US military, attention from Asia ahead of Trump's summit with China's leader

items.headline: Trump squeezed between Israel and Turkey as Netanyahu, Erdogan escalate feud
items.summary: Israel-Turkey tensions escalate sharply as Netanyahu and Erdogan clash over Gaza, Iran and regional influence, creating a diplomatic challenge for Trump.

items.headline: Why BLTs and salad just got more expensive — tariffs, war send tomato prices soaring
items.summary: Tomato prices have risen sharply in recent months, driven largely by trade policy, economists said.

items.headline: Saudi Pipeline Attack Removes 700,000 Barrels Daily from Oil Exports
items.summary: The Saudi energy ministry confirmed on Thursday that Iranian strikes on the kingdom's East-West pipeline have reduced its export capacity by approximately 700,000 barrels per day (bpd). The ministry stated the attacks hit a pumping station on the vital pipeli…
